name: data-governance-platform
description: Enterprise data governance platform with markdown-driven lineage visualization

scripts.catalog:refresh:repo: npm run catalog:refresh:fast && npm run catalog:repo:export && npm run catalog:repo:check
scripts.lineage:runtime:prepare: npm run catalog:repo:export && npm run catalog:repo:check && npm run lineage:runtime:package && npm run lineage:runtime:check && npm run lineage:answers:check && npm run lineage:runtime:sync
scripts.catalog:refresh:fast: npm run catalog:rebuild && npm run catalog:index && npm run catalog:runtime:check
scripts.catalog:refresh: npm run catalog:rebuild:sample && npm run catalog:rebuild:dry && npm run catalog:rebuild && npm run catalog:index && npm run catalog:runtime:check
scripts.confluence:human:publish-packet: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && node scripts/build-human-confluence-catalog-publish-packet.mjs
scripts.confluence:human:publish:dry-run: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs
scripts.confluence:human:publish: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --publish
scripts.confluence:full:tier1:publish:dry-run: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && npm run confluence:full:inventory && npm run confluence:full:tier1:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-03-tier1-publish-packet.json
scripts.confluence:full:tier1:publish: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && npm run confluence:full:inventory && npm run confluence:full:tier1:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-03-tier1-publish-packet.json --publish
scripts.confluence:full:tier2:batch01:publish:dr: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && npm run confluence:full:tier2:batch01:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-04-tier2-thin-object-batch-01-publish-packet.json
scripts.confluence:full:tier2:batch01:publish: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && npm run confluence:full:tier2:batch01:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-04-tier2-thin-object-batch-01-publish-packet.json --publish
scripts.confluence:full:tier2:eleaddw-dbo:publis: npm run confluence:full:tier2:eleaddw-dbo:dry-run && npm run confluence:full:tier2:eleaddw-dbo:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/T2P-04-eleaddw-dbo-tier2-publish-packet.json

npm run confluence:full:tier2:eleaddw-dbo:dry-run && npm run confluence:full:tier2:eleaddw-dbo:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/T2P-04-eleaddw-dbo-tier2-publish-packet.json --publish
scripts.confluence:full:tier3:batch01:publish:dr: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && npm run confluence:full:tier2:batch01:publish-packet && npm run confluence:full:tier3:batch01:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-05-tier3-rich-object-batch-01-publish-packet.json
scripts.confluence:full:tier3:batch01:publish: npm run confluence:human:dry-run && npm run confluence:human:check && npm run confluence:full:tier2:batch01:publish-packet && npm run confluence:full:tier3:batch01:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-05-tier3-rich-object-batch-01-publish-packet.json --publish
scripts.confluence:rovo:validate: npm run confluence:rovo:dry-run && npm run confluence:rovo:check
scripts.confluence:rovo:publish:dry-run: npm run confluence:rovo:validate && npm run confluence:rovo:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --output-root data/confluence/rovo-ai-retrieval-dry-run --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-06-rovo-ai-retrieval-publish-packet.json
scripts.confluence:rovo:publish: npm run confluence:rovo:validate && npm run confluence:rovo:publish-packet && node scripts/publish-human-confluence-catalog-pilot.mjs --output-root data/confluence/rovo-ai-retrieval-dry-run --packet docs/confluence-full-database-catalog-deployment/FDP-06-rovo-ai-retrieval-publish-packet.json --publish
scripts.confluence:publish: npm run confluence:export && npm run confluence:check && npm run confluence:dry-run && npm run confluence:sync -- --publish
scripts.confluence:replace: npm run confluence:export && npm run confluence:check && npm run confluence:dry-run && npm run confluence:sync -- --publish --replace-generated
scripts.lineage:publish: npm run catalog:refresh && npm run catalog:repo:export && npm run catalog:repo:check && npm run confluence:publish
scripts.lineage:replace: npm run catalog:refresh && npm run catalog:repo:export && npm run catalog:repo:check && npm run confluence:replace
scripts.ui:workflow:guardrails: npm run ui:workflow:guardrails:static && npm run ui:profiling:guardrails
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.verify:ci: npm run git:identity:check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:ci && npm run build
